text.title: Nomad Low-Energy Mode Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Nomad Low-Energy Mode end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: pre-declare
step.action: Pre-declare ≥1 week ahead; pick dates + reason.

step.name: draft-auto-reply
step.action: Write 2-3 sentence auto-reply: mode + return + escalation.

step.name: pick-allowed-tasks
step.action: Choose 1-3 task types to keep alive.

step.name: brief-escalation
step.action: Brief contact: what types of issues to forward, decision authority.

step.name: activate
step.action: Flip switch; set auto-replies; calendar updated.

step.name: deactivate
step.action: Explicit deactivation; return-debrief (paused list + catch-up plan).
